Plus and no time to take a photo

reviews.content: For the amount of energy and water this dystopian software uses, it’s gotten worse. I used it for school years ago and it helped, now, can’t even count the letters in word accurately.

reviews.content: this is so u fair 8.00 for more messages and 16.00 for more things this is crazy I only get 3 messages and that’s it that is insane I am never using this app again this is so unfair

reviews.content: I’m wanting to become an actor and I don’t know how to start when I tried using Claude because it’s a reliable AI options right now, but if you tell its age your age it could like ban your account but I guess I’m gonna have to switch to ChatGPT back because it dosent ban me

reviews.title: Scammers
reviews.content: I have been using Claude for several months now, but today, like thousands of other users, they have blocked my profile, continue to ignore user emails and refuse to refund money

reviews.title: What happened??
reviews.content:
I was using cowork on my pc and phone to assist with new construction take off, reading plans catching key notes I missed and items that get lost in multi level/multi family new builds highly complex projects that require multiple estimators to review, Claude made me a one man army, a real force multiplier.

Now it won’t follow the prompts I give it, hallucinating items and measurements, actually making things up that don’t exist in the plans and straight up just half baked results. Leaving me a state of frustration. 

I was paying the pro max subscription $249.00 a month and honestly I’d rather just hire another human to assist me. Un real the disappointment I have, no idea what happened to this product but it is not what it used to be at all.

reviews.title: Worst service ever
reviews.content: I compared this to chat gpt and this is the worst Ai I ever used get chat gpt if u need these

reviews.title: Too expensive

reviews.title: Dictation doesn’t work on iPhone 14
reviews.content: Voice dictation broken on iPhone 14. Text disappears under keyboard after 10 seconds of dictation. Bug reported to support but only getting AI runaround. App unusable for voice input.

reviews.title: Paying pro is not enough
reviews.content: I really loved this AI tool when I knew about it. So I decided I wanted to pay for the pro version so I could use it better. How is it possible that even paying pro version it still has a limit, unbelievable! Is not a cheap subscription for it to be so bad

reviews.title: Limits after two messages?
reviews.content: I like it fine but I’m getting limited after two messages first thing in the morning while I’m trying to work on some things. First thing in the morning when I’ve not opened the app since the previous afternoon. That makes me go back to a competitor and I’d really rather not. I don’t have $20/mo to throw at ai either so forget that.

reviews.title: Just write the code this tool is a joke
reviews.content:
I put a solid month into trying to figure out how to make this app save me time, but somehow it always finds a way to do the exact opposite. I don’t care what plugins you use, what model, the outcome is the same. Trash code on top of trash code. 

Us consumers must get the shaft, or corporations are in big trouble firing 20% of their workforce in favor of AI.

reviews.title: Business
reviews.content: Is that seems good but it doesn’t allow a single business owner to be using it with privacy settings and controls for a reasonable price you have to have a minimal five seats to 20 seats depending on what version you wanna buy. reviews.title: Nasty!

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.content: Absolutely awful. Never does what you instructed it to do, and have to constantly push back. Then they just cut you off and say you hit your usage despite the AI not doing it the first time.

reviews.title: Absolute rubbish

reviews.title: Scam
reviews.content: Paid $100 for a Claude Max subscription, but the account was unilaterally downgraded to a "Free" plan after just 6 days. The support system is entirely run by an AI bot that ignores payment proofs, refuses to escalate to a human, and automatically closes tickets. Forced to initiate a bank chargeback. Warning to B2B (Business-to-Business, продажи корпоративным клиентам) users: beware of billing bugs and non-existent human support at Anthropic

reviews.title: Pro gets you nothing
reviews.content: I paid for pro and I swear I had more tokens when it was free. I asked it it to run the same command I had it run on the free version after my tokens had just refreshed and it didn’t even finish the prompt, it spent 30 min thinking and then told me I was out of tokens. I had run the same command 4-5x on the free version with a faster response and with an actual results.. The content it makes is nice but they’re definitely scamming us

reviews.title: Sync disaster

reviews.title: Don’t bother with Claude
reviews.content: It can’t even follow simple instructions on editing text and photos for graphics. Once it goes off sequence you can never get back. If this is how AI works, I won’t worry about machines taking over the world

reviews.title: Stealing my money

I discovered that Geb Chat Google Jimmy Giani are all respectable applications and do not aim at what this malicious application aims for, which is made by it.

reviews.title: Anthropic Has Gone Downhill
reviews.content: Since the Pentagon deal, Anthropic has really deteriorated in quality. Get a refund for your subscription while you still can.

reviews.title: Overlapping chats
reviews.content: I was asking about a sourdough starter that I’m in the process of making.  The overlap was Gemini tried to tie it to my interview I had.  Not sure how that was relevant to sourdough!  Gemini got incredibly frustrating to use because it was try to personalize my previous conversation about different topics.  I had to delete the previous chat just so Gemini wouldn’t use them in the response.  After a few more attempt I just deleted Gemini entirely and went back to my paid version of ChatGBT and Free version of Claude.

reviews.title: Fabricator
reviews.content: If it doesn’t know something, it makes it up.   Just what humanity needs: an artificial mythomaniac, fabricator, disassembling   generator.

reviews.title: It was fun while it lasted

They decided to do a Microsoft move and took away the pro AI features from business workspace plans.  Making it a separate charge. 

To me, it promotes users to not use AI.

reviews.title: A scam, not an AI
reviews.content: Didn’t get even a single result in 50 prompts given after upgrading. First grader has thousand times more understanding than this stupid app. It’s a shame on AI.

reviews.title: 🛑 COMPLETE FRAUD - REFUND DENIED!
reviews.content:
Review:
Stay away! Not only does this app scam you into paying multiple times (first $3.99, then $9.99 for the same task it never completes), but they also refuse to refund your money.
This is a predatory business model designed to trick users out of their cash. I paid for the "Advanced" version as requested by the AI, and it still failed to deliver. Now, they are holding my money hostage. Do not download, do not subscribe. You have been warned!

reviews.title: A company that supports nationalism
reviews.content: Why am I not allowed to use your product, even though I am paying for a subscription, simply because of my location in a country whose policies you do not support? You are a company from a country of double standards, where you first talk about rights for everyone, and then cut off an entire huge nation from the rest, even though the people are not the same as the government(especially while your country continues to support and fund wars for its own gain). Cut off the Russian government from the world, maintain sanctions that negatively affect the country’s economy, but why leave our people without everything, when we are already being suffocated by our own government? I wish everyone who thinks this is the right strategy could feel this firsthand and lose their jobs because of it.

reviews.title: Bug need to be fixed.
reviews.content: When I tap on the microphone and start talking, Gemini will automatically stop listening and instead, it will just input my request in the text box. I have to stop it for generating response and complete my question in the text then submit the query. this is not how it should be, and I was able to use the app freely without this bug before this latest update. I even tried to uninstall the app and restart my phone then reinstall the app again, but it does not work. I believe this is a bug that needed to be updated for the next version of Gemini.

reviews.title: I wouldn’t suggest!

reviews.title: Useless

reviews.title: Awful
reviews.content: Ai overview of everything even thought I didn’t ask. I don’t want anymore data centers so I’m going to avoid this website at all cost and all internet. Not worth my kids growing up with no forest and no water living next to humming warehouses .

reviews.title: Don’t Be Evil
reviews.content:
Google tracks and sells your activity. 

They started the company with the motto “don’t be evil”. Then a few years went by and they quietly dropped the motto while switching to more aggressive marketing strategies. Today they are one of the most destructive forces on Earth. Their algorithms determine what people see when we search and therefore shapes our understanding of the world. They use this to their advantage by feeding us the version of the world that they believe in. How much of the strife in our modern lives is due to these nefarious corporate tactics to influence the world according to their interests? 

Don’t be evil.
